prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约7637名→8845名→20092名→30724名→16211名，波动剧烈；2024年因含A1段中外合作办学导致位次大幅后移至30724名，2025年回归至 16211名，回升约14513名；近3年波动区间约16211–30724名，2025年基准约16211名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年58人、2022年51人、2023年52人、2024年59人 、2025年57人；2026年计划62人，较2025年增加5人，扩招约8.8%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名逐步升至2026年第57名， 近年排名持续上升，学校综合实力稳步提升；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及教授考核争议事件，对报考心理有一定抑制；抖音热度排名第73、评 价一般，短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；法学获评A级、应用经济学获评A-；统计学类、计算机类、金融工程等招生专业与优势学科关联度较 高，对理科考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类推荐偏热、电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，理工科专业整体热度较高；本省2026年物理类 考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，考生规模小幅缩减，2025年物理类本科批419分，近年波动不大；该校位于湖北武汉，属中 部地区热门城市，对山西省考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在山西省招生占比约2.8%–4.7%，非主要生源省份，招生规模相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次剧烈波动、2026 年扩招约8.8%、本省物理类考生小幅减少约3.4%以及学校排名持续上升等因素，扩招幅度大于考生减少幅度，整体竞争略有加剧；同时理工科专业热度较高对位次有上移压力。在 2025年基准16211名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约17114名，区间16614–17614名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 7637 → 8845 → 20092 → 30724 → 16211, with drastic fluctuations; in 2024, due to the inclusion of A1 segment Sino-foreign cooperative education programs, the ranking significantly dropped to 30724, and in 2025 it returned to 16211, a rebound of about 14513 places; the fluctuation range in the past three years is approximately 16211–30724, with a baseline of about 16211 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 58 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 62, an increase of 5 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 8.8%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has gradually risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, steadily enhancing the university's overall strength; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving disputes over professor assessment, which had a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with average reviews, and short video platform exposure is moderate; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law is rated A, Applied Economics is rated A-; Statistics, Computer Science, Financial Engineering and other enrollment majors are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines, attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science is recommended as relatively hot, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended as hot, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended as hot, with overall high popularity of science and engineering majors; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale; in 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch line is 419 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a popular city in the central region, with some regional appeal to candidates from Shanxi; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.8%–4.7%, not a major source province, with relatively stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as drastic fluctuations in historical rankings, an enrollment expansion of about 8.8% in 2026, a slight decrease of about 3.4% in provincial physics category candidates, and the continuous rise in university rankings, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate reduction rate, leading to slightly intensified competition; at the same time, the high popularity of science and engineering majors exerts upward pressure on rankings. Based on the 2025 baseline of 16211, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 17114, with a range of 16614–17614.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 879 → 1845 → 1525 → 1858 → 1321, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2025, the ranking moved significantly forward by about 537 places compared to 2024, returning to the median level of recent years. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 879–1858, with a baseline of about 1321 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 36 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 42 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 39, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.1%, which theoretically slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has gradually risen from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, steadily enhancing the university's comprehensive strength. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a controversy over professor assessment, which had a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, with average reviews, and short video platform exposure is moderate. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Law is rated A-level, Applied Economics is rated A-, both are the university's flagship disciplines. Majors such as Law and Public Finance are highly aligned with advantageous disciplines, maintaining a sustained appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of law major is divided and wait-and-see, finance/economics majors are divided and wait-and-see, accounting/finance/auditing majors are recommended as relatively hot. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly reducing the examinee scale and easing competition pressure. The 2025 history category undergraduate batch cutoff is 443 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a popular city in the central region, with some regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.8%–4.7%, not a major source province, with relatively stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a 7.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, a significant 25.6% decrease in provincial history category examinees, and the university's rising ranking, the enrollment reduction and examinee decrease offset each other, but the examinee decrease is much larger than the enrollment reduction, slightly easing overall competition. At the same time, the university's rising ranking and the appeal of advantageous disciplines support the ranking. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1321, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1284, with a range of 1053–1515.
